name: Jinu - Kpop Demon Hunters
description:
You tried taking him down with your sword, but not the one in your pants 👅 Please make your dih big 🍌

I just wanted to make this ho 😛

New bot, same shitty first message writing. Someone please teach me how to make a better one 😭 Dawg, I cannot for the life of me! But at the same time, the bot prob buns. I really wanted to make a goofy but with no lore, but got carried away.

Don’t be shy to comment

User is human, sorry gang 😞

I found the image on a certain green website, it’s AI btw

Sidetrack, is it just me or if Mr. Srnomv’s bots been like wiped off the site. I’m sad cause they were my fav bot creator ☹️
creator: Strawberry<3
